articles.title: Officials identify man killed in wrong-way crash in Boston
articles.description:
The 28-year-old man from Haverhill was killed early Sunday morning in a wrong-way crash on I-93.

The post Officials identify man killed in wrong-way crash in Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 28-year-old man from Haverhill died in a wrong-way crash on I-93.
The crash occurred early Sunday morning, raising safety concerns for local drivers.
Officials are investigating to prevent future wrong-way incidents on Boston highways.

articles.title: Germany vs. Paraguay World Cup live coverage: Round of 32 begins at ‘Boston Stadium’
articles.description:
The winner of Monday's match will play the victor of France vs. Sweden in the Round of 16 on July 4 in Philadelphia.

The post Germany vs. Paraguay World Cup live coverage: Round of 32 begins at ‘Boston Stadium’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Germany faces Paraguay in the World Cup Round of 32 at Boston Stadium.
The match occurs on July 4, with the winner advancing to Philadelphia.
Local fans can expect heightened excitement and community engagement during the match.

articles.title: Revolution announce front office shift: Mass. native Chris Tierney named general manager
articles.description:
Curt Onalfo will move from sporting director to senior vice president of soccer operations.

The post Revolution announce front office shift: Mass. native Chris Tierney named general manager appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Chris Tierney, a Massachusetts native, appointed as general manager of the Revolution.
Curt Onalfo transitions to senior vice president of soccer operations effective immediately.
This leadership change aims to enhance the Revolution's performance for Boston soccer fans.

articles.title: Man allegedly pepper sprays woman jogging in apparent random assault in Maine coastal city
articles.description:
He is facing several charges.

The post Man allegedly pepper sprays woman jogging in apparent random assault in Maine coastal city appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Man pepper sprayed a woman jogging in a random assault in Maine.
The suspect faces multiple charges related to the incident.
Boston residents may feel increased concern for safety while exercising outdoors.

articles.title: Noah Kahan asks his audience to please not poop at venues (except in designated areas)
articles.description:
Concertgoers in adjacent rows would like a word.

The post Noah Kahan asks his audience to please not poop at venues (except in designated areas) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Noah Kahan urges concertgoers to use designated restrooms during events.
Kahan's request highlights concerns from attendees about venue cleanliness.
Improper behavior could lead to stricter venue policies affecting Boston concerts.

articles.title: Hiker rescued by helicopter after 50-foot fall in Huntington Ravine
articles.description:
"The upper section is a dangerous cliff climb and should not be listed as a 'hiking' trail."

The post Hiker rescued by helicopter after 50-foot fall in Huntington Ravine appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hiker fell 50 feet in Huntington Ravine and required helicopter rescue.
Rescue occurred on June 29, highlighting dangers of the area.
Officials warn that upper section is not a safe hiking trail.
